Design System v1.0

The single source of truth for Reis IA

Brand identity, design tokens, components, patterns, and guidelines — everything needed to build consistent, premium experiences across the Reis IA ecosystem.

Explore Foundations Browse Components
[01] Explore the System
01

Brand Guidelines

Voice, personality, manifesto, and brand principles.

02

Foundations

Colors, typography, spacing, and all design tokens.

03

Logo System

H1-B Hourglass construction, safe space, and usage rules.

04

Icon System

32-icon library plus the H1-B and agent icons.

05

Surfaces & Elevation

5-tier surface system with borders and shadows.

06

Effects & Motion

Grain, scanner, and animation system.

07

Components

Buttons, cards, forms, and advanced UI patterns.

08

Strategy

Positioning, enemy narrative, and ICP definition.
